opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up a few hours ago freezing and shaking, and then my face started burning. There's a bright red patch on my cheek that's hot and really painful, and it's spreading across my nose and toward my eyes. I've got a high fever and I feel awful.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly overnight and it's getting worse fast — the redness keeps creeping toward my eye and I'm scared because I feel so sick with it.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 8 hours ago I suddenly got violent chills and shaking, then within an hour a red patch appeared on my right cheek
symptom_narrative.character: a fiery red, hot, swollen patch with a raised edge you can feel; it has crossed my nose to the other cheek and the skin feels tight and puffy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe and the whole thing is spreading — I feel really unwell and shivery with it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: started on the right cheek, now across the nose and both cheeks, moving up toward my eyes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily advancing since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps spreading and swelling on its own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: middle-aged adult, lives with spouse who is present and made the call; no recent facial injury, dental problems or sinus trouble

objective_data_offered.value: temperature 39.2 degrees on our home thermometer
heart rate showing about 118 on my smartwatch
a striking bright red raised patch across both cheeks and the bridge of the nose, with a sharp firm advancing edge; the skin looks swollen and dimpled like orange peel
spouse reports he is flushed, sweaty and shivering with rigors, wrapped in blankets, and is lying in bed feeling very unwell
